steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Start with $5|x|=45$. Divide both sides by $5$:
$$|x|=9$$

steps.title: Use the meaning of absolute value
steps.content:
$|x|=9$ means the distance from $x$ to $0$ is $9$. The two possible values are:
$$x=9\quad\text{or}\quad x=-9$$

steps.title: Pick the positive solution
steps.content: The question asks for the positive solution, so choose $9$, not $-9$.
